titleJa: managed agent の基本プリミティブが、複数ベンダーで一気に出そろい始める
titleEn: Managed agent primitives are arriving across multiple vendors at once
summaryJa: OpenAI の new tools for building agents と AWS の multi-agent collaboration GA により、agent runtime、tooling、multi-agent coordination は製品レイヤーの比較対象になっている。
summaryEn: OpenAI's new agent-building tools and AWS's multi-agent collaboration GA put runtimes, tooling, and multi-agent coordination onto the product-comparison layer.
